/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/stress_test_shared_mutex.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/stress_test_shared_mutex.dir/stress_test_shared_mutex.cpp.o -o stress_test_shared_mutex  ../_deps/nghttp2-build/lib/libnghttp2.a ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a -lpthread -luring /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
